rationale: The evidence only confirms a DOI-level match (10.1509/jmr.17.0019) without any in-text citation context, so its role in the 2024 paper is unclear. The two papers do share strong topical/method overlap (consumer-neuroscience fMRI and neural profiling/whole-brain inference), which means the 2018 paper could plausibly be a methodological or foundational prior rather than a mere mention. With this sparse evidence, it is not safe to drop, but there is not enough to clearly keep.
